rule CDB_CVE202629182__Parse_Server_Cloud_Hooks_a {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-29182 - Parse Server: Cloud Hooks and Cloud Jobs bypass `readOnlyMaster"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-08"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-29182" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 6 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 5 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
